title: Fantastic Mobs
description: Introducing "Fantastic Mobs," a captivating Minecraft mod that brings a delightful new creature to your world: the Kiwi Bird! This charming avian companion is not only adorable but also highly functional.
body:
Introducing "Fantastic Mobs," a captivating Minecraft mod that brings a delightful new creature to your world: the Kiwi Bird! This charming avian companion is not only adorable but also highly functional.

Tameable with watermelons or any fish, the Kiwi Bird is the perfect addition to your Minecraft adventures. Once tamed, it will faithfully follow you on your journey, providing companionship and assistance along the way.

But that's not all! The Kiwi Bird has a special talent for combat - it will automatically target and shoot spiders within range, keeping you safe from arachnid threats as you explore the world.

With its friendly demeanor and useful abilities, the Kiwi Bird is sure to become your new favorite companion. Keep an eye out for this feathered friend as it spawns naturally in most land biomes, adding a touch of whimsy to your Minecraft experience. Don't miss out on the "Fantastic Mobs" mod - download it now and embark on adventures with your trusty Kiwi Bird by your side!

Mod is still in alpha stage, yet to be developed further.

Credits to Suguam for the idea and model inspiration!
